sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 10:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 10:1
items.html: The letters are the vessels where the self is clothed. They contain twenty-two heads of discernments, from which all the Partzufim are built. They are called twenty-two letters. See above, answer No. 1. (Part 6, Item 53)
